title: Jedi Flow
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Jedi Flow''' was a game taught to young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]]. It helped hone their senses and familiarize them with the flow of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] around them. [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] taught this game to several clone troopers while on Cestus.<ref name="Cestus Deception">''[[The Cestus Deception]]''</ref>

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the afterword to ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' [[Steven Barnes]] likened body-flow to Jedi practice.<ref name="Cestus Deception" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
